title: The post-quantum cryptography migration process and national security
issuingOrg: Ban Cơ yếu Chính phủ (Government Cipher Committee)
summary: Article in the Government Cipher Committee's journal arguing Vietnam needs a national-level post-quantum cryptography (PQC) transition roadmap led by the Committee, including risk-classifying critical systems, piloting PQC and moving to hybrid cryptography. States the Committee has advised on PQC since NIST's 2017 process.

title: Institute of Cryptographic Science and Technology strengthens post-quantum cryptography research capacity in Vietnam
issuingOrg: Ban Cơ yếu Chính phủ (Government Cipher Committee)
summary: Reports that the Institute of Cryptographic Science and Technology, under the Government Cipher Committee, is building post-quantum cryptography research capacity focused on lattice-based schemes (Kyber/ML-KEM, Dilithium) and hash-based signatures, with a dedicated quantum-cryptography group established in 2023.

title: New milestone in quantum-resistant cryptography research at the Academy of Cryptography Techniques
issuingOrg: Ban Cơ yếu Chính phủ (Government Cipher Committee)
summary: Reports that the Academy of Cryptography Techniques, directed by the Government Cipher Committee, conducted research integrating post-quantum cryptography including the CRYSTALS-Dilithium algorithm into Vietnamese-developed hardware security modules (HSM).

title: Development of hash-based quantum-resistant digital signature schemes
issuingOrg: Ban Cơ yếu Chính phủ (Government Cipher Committee)
summary: Technical article in the Government Cipher Committee's official journal on the development of hash-based quantum-resistant digital signature schemes, relevant to Vietnam's domestic VN-PQSign post-quantum signature work.

title: The role of quantum cryptography in ensuring national information security
issuingOrg: Ban Cơ yếu Chính phủ (Government Cipher Committee)
summary: Article stating that the Government Cipher Committee, as national cryptographic agency, is advising on national quantum-resistant cryptographic standards and technical regulations to prepare for the quantum-computer era in the 2030-2035 period.

title: Trends in cryptographic science and technology and challenges to national defence and security in the new period (part 2)
issuingOrg: Ban Cơ yếu Chính phủ (Government Cipher Committee)
summary: Policy/strategy article in the Government Cipher Committee's journal identifying quantum computers as a major threat to national critical systems and prioritising research and development of quantum-computer-resistant cryptographic systems.

title: Continuing in-depth research in the field of quantum cryptography
issuingOrg: Ban Cơ yếu Chính phủ (Government Cipher Committee)
summary: Item in the Government Cipher Committee's official journal on continued in-depth quantum cryptography research within the cipher/defence-security sector, including post-quantum-resistant cryptographic work.
